mapper.sql: report_id, user_id, device_id, reservation_id, status, created_at, description, images
mapper.insert: insert into fault_report (report_id, user_id, device_id, reservation_id, status, created_at, description, images) values (#{report_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{images,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into fault_report
report_id,
user_id,
device_id,
reservation_id,
status,
created_at,
description,
images,
#{report_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{images,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update fault_report
user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reservation_id = #{reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
images = #{images,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where report_id = #{report_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update fault_report set user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reservation_id = #{reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, images = #{images,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where report_id = #{report_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
from fault_report where device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status = '可能发生故障'
